exploration_notes: Health checking service: `DefaultHealthCheckService` in src/cpp/server/health/ implements the gRPC health checking protocol with Watch support. Client-side health checking: `HealthProducer` and its inner `ConnectivityWatcher` in src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client{.cc,_internal.h} use `SubchannelStreamClient` to perform health checks from the client/LB side. Keepalive timer: `init_keepalive_ping`, `maybe_reset_keepalive_ping_timer_locked`, and `grpc_chttp2_keepalive_timeout` in chttp2_tr
